$comment: Template for cache-proxy upstreams. Copy to upstreams.json (gitignored) and list ONLY idempotent, write-free, non-live-state servers — those are the safe cache candidates. Servers with frequent writes (memory, semantic-edit) trigger coarse whole-cache flushes; live-state servers (browser automation) would return stale results. Keep those direct in your client config, not here.
